hero.headline: Honest food, made from scratch
hero.subheadline: Seasonal ingredients, simple preparations, and a menu that changes with what's fresh. Join us for dinner or take it to go.

featured.name: Handmade Pasta
featured.description: Fresh pasta made daily — pappardelle, rigatoni, and seasonal shapes tossed with simple, well-sourced ingredients.

featured.name: Wood-Fired Dishes
featured.description: Our wood-burning oven brings out deep flavor in everything from roasted vegetables to whole fish.

featured.name: Natural Wines
featured.description: A curated list of small-production wines from winemakers who farm responsibly.

items.name: Burrata & Stone Fruit
items.description: Creamy burrata, seasonal stone fruit, basil, olive oil, grilled bread.

items.name: Charred Octopus
items.description: Tender octopus, crispy potatoes, smoked paprika aioli, lemon.

items.name: Roasted Beet Salad
items.description: Mixed beets, arugula, goat cheese, candied walnuts, sherry vinaigrette.

items.name: Soup of the Day
items.description: Made fresh daily. Ask your server for today's selection.

items.name: Pappardelle Bolognese
items.description: Slow-cooked beef and pork ragu, fresh pappardelle, parmigiano.

items.name: Pan-Roasted Salmon
items.description: Wild salmon, farro risotto, roasted fennel, salsa verde.

items.name: Grilled Ribeye
items.description: 12oz grass-fed ribeye, roasted bone marrow butter, seasonal greens.

items.name: Mushroom Risotto
items.description: Arborio rice, mixed wild mushrooms, truffle oil, aged parmesan.

items.name: Olive Oil Cake
items.description: Citrus glaze, whipped mascarpone, seasonal compote.

items.name: Affogato
items.description: Vanilla gelato, hot espresso, amaretti cookie.

items.name: Dark Chocolate Torte
items.description: Flourless chocolate torte, sea salt, crème fraîche.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: The pasta here is the best I've had outside of Italy. The space is warm and unpretentious. We come back every week.

testimonials.name: James R.
testimonials.text: Finally a restaurant that lets the ingredients speak for themselves. The seasonal menu keeps things exciting.

testimonials.name: Linda K.
testimonials.text: Perfect for date night or a casual dinner with friends. The wine list is thoughtful and reasonably priced.

team.name: Marco Alessi
team.title: Head Chef
team.bio: Trained in Bologna, Marco brings fifteen years of kitchen experience and a commitment to seasonal, ingredient-driven cooking.

team.name: Elena Torres
team.title: Pastry Chef
team.bio: Elena's desserts balance sweetness with restraint. Her olive oil cake has been on the menu since day one — nobody will let her take it off.
